steps.title: Identify the surface to count
steps.content: The box has equal edge lengths of 86 cm and square sides with no lid. This is a cube missing its top face, so we count exactly 5 square faces for the exterior surface.

steps.title: Calculate and convert to square meters
steps.content:
Each square face has area $86^2$ cm². The total is:
$$5 \times 86^2 = 5 \times 7396 = 36,980 \text{ cm}^2$$
To convert to m², divide by the conversion factor 1 m² = 10,000 cm²:
$$\frac{36,980}{10,000} = 3.698 \text{ m}^2$$
